category_label: Floor lamps, sconces & tabletop art objects
title: Floor lamp-light sculpture LC0194
description: This floor lamp looks like a vertical light sculpture built from rhythm, glass and reflections. Transparent glass elements in a rich green-turquoise shade are layered around the light source. Their shape recalls crystallized petals frozen mid-motion. Slender vertical uprights and a metal base with a warm gold finish add architectural rigor and balance the organic quality of the glass. This contrast makes the floor lamp read not as an ordinary light source but as an art object that works both day
